title: US asked Iran 20-year enrichment moratorium
snippet: US proposed Iran accept 20-year moratorium on all uranium enrichment. Also asked Iran remove all highly enriched uranium from country. Iran offered 'monitored process of down-blending' as counter. Iranians thought close to initial agreement Sunday morning, caught off guard by Vance press conference.
tag_reason: New Axios scoop revealing specific US nuclear demands (20-year moratorium) and Iran counter-proposal (down-blending). Previously only general 'nuclear' framing.
